metadata.title: Qvicko — Automations, E-commerce & Web Solutions
metadata.description: Qvicko by William Soderstrom. I build AI automations, custom e-commerce solutions, modern websites and digital AI services that drive growth for your business.

servicesDropdown.aiDesc: Strategic advice on AI and digitalization

hero.title: I build digital solutions
hero.description: Hi, I'm William Soderstrom — founder of Qvicko. I help businesses automate, sell more online and grow digitally with AI-powered solutions and modern web technology.

services.title: My services
services.subtitle: From idea to launch — I help you with the entire chain.

automation.title: AI Automations
automation.description: I build intelligent automations that streamline your workflows. From data collection and reporting to customer communication — let AI do the heavy lifting.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce Solutions
ecommerce.description: Custom e-commerce solutions built to convert. Headless architecture, fast load times and seamless payment flows.

webdev.title: Web Design & Development
webdev.description: Modern websites built with cutting-edge technology. Responsive, fast and SEO-optimized — designed to impress and perform.

ai.title: AI Consulting & Digital Services
ai.description: Strategic consulting for businesses looking to leverage AI. I help you identify opportunities, choose the right tools and implement solutions.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: The person behind Qvicko
about.description: My name is William Soderstrom and I run Qvicko — a digital consultancy focused on helping businesses grow with modern technology and AI.
about.paragraph2: With experience in web development, e-commerce, automations and AI, I help businesses — from startups to established companies — digitalize and streamline their operations.
about.paragraph3: When you work with me, you get direct contact with the person actually building your solution. No bureaucracy, no middlemen — just results.

values.personalDesc: You always talk directly with me
values.qualityDesc: I deliver nothing I'm not proud of myself
values.resultsDesc: Everything I build should add value to your business

process.title: How I work
process.subtitle: From first contact to launch — a clear and transparent process.

step1.title: Consultation
step1.description: We start with a free call where I listen to your needs, goals and challenges. Together we identify opportunities.

step2.title: Strategy & Planning
step2.description: I create a clear plan with timeline, tech choices and budget. You know exactly what you get and when.

step3.title: Development & Design
step3.description: I build the solution with continuous dialogue. You get regular updates and can give feedback throughout the process.

step4.title: Launch & Support
step4.description: When everything is ready, we launch together. I offer support and maintenance so your solution keeps performing.

portfolio.title: Selected projects
portfolio.subtitle: Here are some examples of what I've built.

project1.title: E-commerce Platform
project1.description: A custom headless e-commerce solution with high conversion rates and lightning-fast load times.

project2.title: AI Automation for Logistics
project2.description: Automated order flow and inventory management with AI-driven forecasting that saved 20+ hours per week.

project3.title: Business Website & SEO
project3.description: Modern website with SEO strategy that increased organic traffic by over 300% in 6 months.

whyWebizo.title: Why Qvicko?
whyWebizo.subtitle: What sets me apart from a large agency.

personal.title: Personal service
personal.description: You always talk directly with the developer. No salespeople, no project managers — just me and your solution.

modern.title: Modern technology
modern.description: I use the latest tools and frameworks. Your solution is built with the future in mind.

results.title: Results-focused
results.description: I measure success in business value — not lines of code. Every solution is designed to give you concrete results.

transparent.title: Full transparency
transparent.description: Clear communication, fixed prices and no surprises. You always know where we stand.

testimonials.title: What my clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Businesses that have chosen to work with me.

testimonial1.quote: William delivered an e-commerce solution that exceeded our expectations. Professional, fast and always available.
testimonial1.name: Anna Lindqvist
testimonial1.title: CEO, Nordisk Handel AB

testimonial2.quote: The automations Qvicko built save us over 20 hours a week. Best investment we've made.
testimonial2.name: Erik Johansson
testimonial2.title: Founder, TechStart

testimonial3.quote: Working with William is a breath of fresh air. Direct communication, high quality and solutions that actually work.
testimonial3.name: Sara Bergstrom
testimonial3.title: Marketing Manager, CreativeFlow

cta.title: Ready to take the next step?
cta.description: Create an account and get access to my digital services. Automations, e-commerce and web solutions — all in one place.
cta.note: Free to register — get started in minutes

userDomain.title: Domain
userDomain.subtitle: Manage your domain settings.
userDomain.noDomainDesc: You have not connected any domain yet.
userDomain.connectDesc: Enter your domain below. You can type it with or without www and https.
userDomain.invalidDomain: Enter a valid domain, e.g. mybusiness.com
userDomain.formatHint: All formats work: domain.com, www.domain.com, https://www.domain.com
userDomain.step1Title: Log in to your domain registrar
userDomain.step1Desc: Go to the panel where you manage your domain (e.g. GoDaddy, Namecheap, Cloudflare).
userDomain.step2Desc: Create a CNAME record with the following values:
userDomain.step3Desc: It can take up to 24 hours before the changes are active. We will notify you when the domain is ready.
userDomain.dnsWait: DNS changes can take up to 24 hours. We check automatically and notify you by email when everything is ready.
userDomain.subdomainDesc: Each website automatically gets a subdomain on qvicko.se
userDomain.customDomainDesc: Connect your own domain to one of your websites.
userDomain.verificationRequired: Verification required: add the following DNS record at your domain registrar
userDomain.buyDomainDesc: Search and register a new domain instantly. DNS is configured automatically — no manual setup needed.
userDomain.buyDomainPlaceholder: Search for a domain, e.g. mybusiness.com
userDomain.tryAnother: Try a different domain or another TLD (.com, .se, .nu, etc.)
userDomain.autoRenewalDesc: Automatically renew the domain before it expires
userDomain.manualRenewalDesc: Renew the domain immediately with your registered card
userDomain.transferDomainDesc: Move the domain to another registrar
